payload.title: Peer review of grants is all we have for now. It’s like Churchill’s take on democracy; “the worst form of government - e
payload.text:
Peer review of grants is all we have for now. It’s like Churchill’s take on democracy; “the worst form of government - except for all those other forms...” 

Could AI be the solution?

metrics.accessibleLabel: Verified account | 1 hour ago | Grok actions | More | Verified account | 1 hour ago | 5 replies, 1 repost, 32 likes, 1 bookmark, 6562 views | 5 Replies. Reply | 1 repost. Repost | 32 Likes. Like | 6562 views. View post analytics | Bookmark | Share post

quotedTweet.text:
Peer review rewards cronyism, conservatism & caution, not breakthroughs. Craig exemplified this:

“…by the time grant reviewers got through [Craig’s] proposals & wrote why [it] was impossible, he had snagged the cover of Science or Nature.” x.com/evolvingjuan/s…
